design_strategy.core_concept: The Command Center. A high-density, high-performance workspace for AI orchestration. It should feel like a game engine editor (Unreal/Unity) mixed with a sci-fi tactical dashboard.
design_strategy.visual_style: Dark Mode Only. High Contrast. Neon Accents. Glassmorphism where appropriate.
design_strategy.layout_philosophy: Bento Grid for dashboards. Tetris Grid for landing pages. Density is a feature, not a bug.

usage_rules.gradients: Avoid full screen gradients. Use subtle radial gradients for spotlights.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-surface border border-border text-white hover:bg-surface_highlight rounded-sm transition-all duration-200

cards.default: bg-surface border border-border/50 rounded-md p-6 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300 relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-sm placeholder:text-zinc-600 text-zinc-200

universal_guidelines: Dark Mode is mandatory. Do not create a light mode toggle.
Do not use gradients for background, use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Use 'Rajdhani' font for all headings to maintain the Sci-Fi/Tech aesthetic.
Use 'Outfit' for body text for readability.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all code snippets and data values.
All cards must have a slight border (border-white/5) to separate them from the background.
Do not use generic 'SaaS Blue' - use vibrant Electric Blue or Cyan.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against dark backgrounds.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-fidelity Game Studio Dashboard. The user expects a 'Ubisoft' level of polish. This means sharp edges, high contrast, technical fonts, and a 'command center' feel. Use the provided image URLs for avatars and project thumbnails to make the UI look populated and real. Do not use placeholders. Use 'sonner' for notifications.
